name: Work slip update after adjusting tip

steps.name: Given I am on the HOME page
When I clock in the timesheet with PIN "9606"
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: 'PASSWORD' }) }).getByText('9', { exact: true })
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: 'PASSWORD' }) }).getByText('6', { exact: true })
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: 'PASSWORD' }) }).getByText('0', { exact: true })
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: 'PASSWORD' }) }).getByText('6', { exact: true })
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title') }).locator('div.MuiDialogActions-root').getByRole('button', { name: 'CONFIRM', exact: true })
Then I should see the employee "WorkSlipAdjustTip" in the employee list
Then I should see the "Ticket View" screen
And I should see the "Manicure" service
When I add the "Manicure" service to my cart
And I select the "FULL SET & FILL IN" category
Expect "toHaveText" locator('button.MuiButtonBase-root').getByText('FULL SET & FILL IN', { exact: true })
Click locator('button.MuiButtonBase-root').getByText('FULL SET & FILL IN', { exact: true })
And I add the "Taxable" service to my cart
And I select the "GIFT CARD" category
And I add the "Shampoo" service to my cart
And I add the "Gift card $100" service to my cart
Then I should see a popup dialog with title "Activate Gift Card $100.00"
And I click on the "OK" button in the popup dialog
Then I should see the number card "2222" visible
When I click on the "ADD ON" button in the popup dialog
Then I should see the service "Gift card $100 (2222)" in my cart
And I should see my cart showing 4 item added
When I click on the total price of "Manicure"
When I click on the "PAY" button
And I select the "Credit" payment type
And I fill the last 4 digits of card number "1234"
And I click on the element with id "payment"
Then I should be redirected to HOME page
Given I am on the CLOSED_TICKETS page
When I wait for the page fully loaded
And I wait for the page fully loaded
Then I should see the first ticket of payment "$234.27"
When I reopen ticket with payment amount "$234.27"

Expect "toBeVisible" locator('.MuiDataGrid-row').filter({ has: locator('[data-field="paymentTotal"]').filter({ hasText: '$234.27' }) }).filter({ has: locator('[data-field="paymentMethod"]').filter({ hasText: /.+/ }) }).first()

Expect "toContainText" locator('.MuiDataGrid-row').filter({ has: locator('[data-field="paymentTotal"]').filter({ hasText: '$234.27' }) }).filter({ has: locator('[data-field="paymentMethod"]').filter({ hasText: /.+/ }) }).first()

Click locator('.MuiDataGrid-row').filter({ has: locator('[data-field="paymentTotal"]').filter({ hasText: '$234.27' }) }).filter({ has: locator('[data-field="paymentMethod"]').filter({ hasText: /.+/ }) }).first()
And I wait for the page fully loaded
Then I should see the "Ticket View" screen
And I should see the user info "WorkSlipAdjustTip" in the ticket
When I click on the "PAY" button
Then I should see the payment history "VISA (1234)" visible
And I should see the payment price contain amount "$234.27"

Expect "toBeVisible" locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('.MuiDialogTitle-root').filter({ hasText: /confirm\s+adjust\s+tip/i }) }).last().locator('div.MuiDialogActions-root').getByRole('button', { name: /adjust\s*tip/i }).or(locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('.MuiDialogTitle-root').filter({ hasText: /confirm\s+adjust\s+tip/i }) }).last().getByRole('button', { name: /adjust\s*tip/i }))

Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('.MuiDialogTitle-root').filter({ hasText: /confirm\s+adjust\s+tip/i }) }).last().locator('div.MuiDialogActions-root').getByRole('button', { name: /adjust\s*tip/i }).or(locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('.MuiDialogTitle-root').filter({ hasText: /confirm\s+adjust\s+tip/i }) }).last().getByRole('button', { name: /adjust\s*tip/i }))
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('.MuiDialogTitle-root').filter({ hasText: /adjust\s+tip/i }) }).last().getByRole('button', { name: /add\s*tip/i })
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('.MuiDialogTitle-root').filter({ hasText: /adjust\s+tip/i }) }).last().getByRole('button', { name: /add\s*tip/i })
And I click on the "CLOSE TICKET" button
Expect "toBeVisible" getByRole('button', { name: 'CLOSE TICKET', exact: true })
Click getByRole('button', { name: 'CLOSE TICKET', exact: true })
Then I should be redirected to HOME page
Given I am on the CLOSED_TICKETS page
When I wait for the page fully loaded
And I wait for the page fully loaded
And I select the first ticket with payment "$244.27"
And I click on item button "Work Slip"
Then I should see the Employee, Price, Tip as "WorkSlipAdjustTip $229.40 $10.00" on the work slip
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('.render-bill div[style*="display: grid"]').filter({ has: locator('span').first().filter({ hasText: 'WorkSlipAdjustTip' }) })
Expect "toHaveText" locator('.render-bill div[style*="display: grid"]').filter({ has: locator('span').first().filter({ hasText: 'WorkSlipAdjustTip' }) }).locator('> span').first()
Expect "toContainText" locator('.render-bill div[style*="display: grid"]').filter({ has: locator('span').first().filter({ hasText: 'WorkSlipAdjustTip' }) }).locator('> span').nth(1)
Expect "toContainText" locator('.render-bill div[style*="display: grid"]').filter({ has: locator('span').first().filter({ hasText: 'WorkSlipAdjustTip' }) }).locator('> span').nth(2)
And I should see the "Sub Total: $229.40" on the work slip
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('.render-bill div[style*="display: flex"]').filter({ has: locator('span').first().filter({ hasText: /^Sub Total[:]?$/i }) })
Expect "toHaveText" locator('.render-bill div[style*="display: flex"]').filter({ has: locator('span').first().filter({ hasText: /^Sub Total[:]?$/i }) }).locator('span').last()
And I should see the "Tax: $0.96" on the work slip
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('.render-bill div[style*="display: flex"]').filter({ has: locator('span').first().filter({ hasText: /^Tax[:]?$/i }) })
Expect "toHaveText" locator('.render-bill div[style*="display: flex"]').filter({ has: locator('span').first().filter({ hasText: /^Tax[:]?$/i }) }).locator('span').last()
And I should see the "Ticket Tip: $10.00" on the work slip
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('.render-bill div[style*="display: flex"]').filter({ has: locator('span').first().filter({ hasText: /^Ticket Tip[:]?$/i }) })
Expect "toHaveText" locator('.render-bill div[style*="display: flex"]').filter({ has: locator('span').first().filter({ hasText: /^Ticket Tip[:]?$/i }) }).locator('span').last()
And I should see the "TOTAL: $240.36" on the work slip
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('.render-bill div[style*="display: flex"]').filter({ has: locator('span').first().filter({ hasText: /^TOTAL[:]?$/i }) })
Expect "toHaveText" locator('.render-bill div[style*="display: flex"]').filter({ has: locator('span').first().filter({ hasText: /^TOTAL[:]?$/i }) }).locator('span').last()
And I should see the "Visa #1234 $240.36" on the work slip
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('.render-bill div[style*="display: flex"]').filter({ has: locator('span').first().filter({ hasText: /^Visa #1234[:]?$/i }) })
Expect "toHaveText" locator('.render-bill div[style*="display: flex"]').filter({ has: locator('span').first().filter({ hasText: /^Visa #1234[:]?$/i }) }).locator('span').last()
When I click on the "Reopen ticket" button
Expect "toBeVisible" getByRole('button', { name: 'Reopen ticket', exact: true })
Click getByRole('button', { name: 'Reopen ticket', exact: true })
And I wait for the page fully loaded
Then I should see the "Ticket View" screen
And I should see the user info "WorkSlipAdjustTip" in the ticket
When I void the current open ticket with reason "Mistake"

Expect "toBeVisible" locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: 'SELECT VOID REASON' }) }).or(locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: 'VOID TICKET' }) }))
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: 'SELECT VOID REASON' }) }).getByText('Mistake')
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#draggable-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: 'CONFIRM VOID' }) }).getByRole('button', { name: 'CONFIRM' })
Then I should be redirected to HOME page

retries.statusDetails:
Error: expect(locator).toBeVisible() failed

Locator: locator('.MuiDataGrid-row').locator('[data-field="paymentTotal"]').filter({ hasText: '$234.27' }).first()
Expected: visible
Timeout: 30000ms
Error: element(s) not found

Call log:
  - Expect "toBeVisible" with timeout 30000ms
  - waiting for locator('.MuiDataGrid-row').locator('[data-field="paymentTotal"]').filter({ hasText: '$234.27' }).first()
